message:
fix(cli): reap child on try_wait error in git_binary_doctor_entry

Same zombie-leak shape as bfc2d913 and b697c1be but in the doctor's
git-version prober. On the `try_wait` -> `Err(e)` path we joined the
reader threads and returned a warn json payload, but left the child
unreaped. A flood of transient try_wait errors would accumulate
zombie git processes for the rest of the server's lifetime.

Added best-effort `child.kill(); child.wait()` before returning so
the PID is reclaimed before the error propagates.
